ownership_links: Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 100% of Lakeview Distribution Corp.
Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 100% of Pinoak Financial Services Inc.
Cedarbrook Group Inc. owns 75% of Ridgetop Realty Ltd.
Pinoak Financial Services Inc. owns 60% of Bridgewater Asset Management Inc.
Lakeview Distribution Corp. owns 100% of Lakeview Transport No. 1 Inc.
Lakeview Distribution Corp. owns 100% of Lakeview Transport No. 2 Inc.
relationships: Cedarbrook Group Inc. controls all subsidiaries through board appointment authority
Pinoak Financial Services Inc. holds regulated licences for Bridgewater Asset Management Inc.
Lakeview Distribution Corp. coordinates operations of transport subsidiaries via intercompany services agreements
Ridgetop Realty Ltd. is a joint venture between Cedarbrook Group Inc. and Westcoast Properties Corp.
Weststone Capital Partners Ltd. holds 40% of Bridgewater Asset Management Inc.
